title: leptochilus harlandii
intro: Leptochilus harlandii, also known as Harland's Leptochilus, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leptochilus harlandii are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Leptochilus harlandii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
